title: olearia microdisca
intro: Olearia microdisca, commonly known as the dwarf tree daisy or bush daisy, is a shrubby perennial plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. Olearia microdisca can be prepared in various ways, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internal consumption for immune system support.
